stories.title: NASCAR icon Kyle Busch dies at the age of 41
stories.summary: NASCAR icon Kyle Busch, a two-time Cup Series champion who won more races across the sport's three series than any other driver in history, has died at the age of 41.

stories.title: 'We were just rooted in the culture of LeBron': Ho...
stories.summary: The clock is ticking on Cleveland's core, even though the franchise is back in the conference finals for the first time since the LeBron James era ended.

stories.title: Sources: OKC's Williams (hamstring) day-to-day
stories.summary: Thunder star wing Jalen Williams will be evaluated day by day, game-to-game with a left hamstring injury, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Thursday.

stories.title: LeBron mulls Lakers-Thunder gap: 'Out-talented'
stories.summary: LeBron James says the Lakers were "out-talented" by the Thunder in the playoffs.

stories.title: Lions ink All-Pro LB Campbell to 4-year extension
stories.summary: The Lions have signed Jack Campbell to a four-year extension, putting him under contract with the franchise through the 2030 season.
